creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: cde70e312c3f should solve the problem as a workaround, but the underlying issue likely needs new microcode or a new CPU. Once those are available we'll ask folks to test the original code path (via the vm.pmap.pcid_invlpg_workaround tunable) and we should be able to tighten up the workaround to apply only to known microcode versions/CPUs.
